profil.deskripsi_bisnis: PT Diamond Citra Propertindo Tbk, together with its subsidiaries, engages in real estate business in Indonesia. It is involved in house, aparthouse, low-rise, high-rise, and mixed-used projects. The company was founded in 2014 and is headquartered in Depok, Indonesia. PT Diamond Citra Propertindo Tbk operates as a subsidiary of PT Karya Permata Inovasi Indonesia.
